description: You are working on the WeatherApp Android project. Configure JaCoCo (Java Code Coverage) reporting in app/build.gradle.kts to track test coverage for the WeatherUtils utility class. Apply the 'jacoco' plugin with toolVersion 0.8.12 and register a custom Gradle task named 'jacocoTestReport' of type JacocoReport. This task must depend on 'testDebugUnitTest', enable HTML reports, and include source directories src/main/java and src/main/kotlin. The class directories should be set from the debug compiled output (app/build/tmp/kotlin-classes/debug), excluding generated files (**/R.class, **/R$*.class, **/BuildConfig.*, **/Manifest*.*, **/*Test*.*, **/databinding/**, **/android/**). Set the execution data to app/build/jacoco/testDebugUnitTest.exec. The configuration should allow generating an HTML coverage report at app/build/reports/jacoco/jacocoTestReport/html/index.html via the './gradlew jacocoTestReport' command. Do not modify WeatherUtils.kt or WeatherUtilsTest.kt.
